name: project-doc
description: Generate a modular documentation system from ALL project evidence — files, handoffs, memory, graph, git log, and session transcripts — kept in a versioned append-only journal, projected into a lightweight CLAUDE.md routing table + .claude/docs/*.md per concern + thin pointers (AGENTS.md, GEMINI.md, .cursorrules). Scrubber moves secrets to a vault, never to git. Supports delta/--deep/--rebuild, incremental updates, v1→v2 migration, monorepo layouts, a doc-first guard hook, and cleanup of stale test artifacts.
